architecture.summary: Replace inline file-writing loop in update.ts (lines 191-226) with calls to installSymlink() from canonical.ts. Same pattern used by init (syncCoreSkills) and install (add.ts). No new components — reuse existing canonical installer.

integrations.summary: No external integrations. Internal only: canonical.ts installSymlink/installCopy, frontmatter.ts stripClaudeFields, agents-registry.ts detectInstalledAgents. All existing functions, no new APIs.

ui-ux.summary: CLI command only. No UI changes. User-facing behavior: update command now correctly routes skills per agent type. No new flags or prompts needed.

performance.summary: No performance impact. Symlink creation is negligible. One extra canonical write per skill is minimal. No caching or load concerns for CLI tool.

security.summary: No auth or data protection changes. stripClaudeFields already handles removing sensitive Claude-specific frontmatter from non-Claude agent copies.

edge-cases.summary: Symlink failure fallback to copy already exists in installSymlink(). Ghost file cleanup needs to work with canonical dir. Multiple agents detected simultaneously handled by per-agent loop in installSymlink().
